mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '迟到' WHEN 3 THEN '早退' WHEN 4 THEN '请假' ELSE '未知' END as type_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '迟到' WHEN 3 THEN '早退' WHEN 4 THEN '请假' ELSE '未知' END as type_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.*, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '迟到' WHEN 3 THEN '早退' WHEN 4 THEN '请假' ELSE '未知' END as type_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name as user_name, CASE a.type WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '迟到' WHEN 3 THEN '早退' WHEN 4 THEN '请假' ELSE '未知' END as type_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
